description: Low fill-factor coil shot cutaway: 5-turn coil in cross-section (current OUT top / IN bottom, circulation arrows on the turns), faint longitudinal flux through the empty bore along a dashed axis. Steel shaft fades in resting on the lower bore wall, flux wisps bend in and a dense bright bundle draws end-to-end (STEEL >> AIR chip), then AIR GAP / NO ELECTRICAL CONTACT callout with ping. No poles or indications drawn.
